store.description: Generate a NgRx Signal Store following project conventions

api-provider.description: Generate a frontend API provider (interface, Http impl, mock, provider function)

backend-module.description: Generate a Hono backend module (routes, controller, service, repository)

drizzle-schema.description: Generate a Drizzle table schema with optional relations

page.description: Generate a route page component with optional store and API provider

crud.description: Generate a full CRUD vertical slice (schema + backend + provider + store + page)

app.description: Generate a new Angular app pre-wired to @resetshop/* packages
